queries.question: What Boeing planes have 180 seats and what Airbus planes have the same number of seats?
queries.sql:
SELECT planes.model
FROM manufacturers JOIN plane_details ON manufacturers.id = plane_details.manufacturer_id JOIN planes ON plane_details.plane_id = planes.id
WHERE (manufacturers.name = "Boeing" OR manufacturers.name = "Airbus") AND planes.number_of_seats = 180
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model WHERE {
  ?manufacturers a :manufacturers .
  ?plane_details a :plane_details .
  ?plane_details p:hasmanufacturers ?manufacturers .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?plane_details p:hasplanes ?planes .
  ?planes p:model ?model .
  ?manufacturers p:name ?name_w .
  ?manufacturers p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?planes p:number_of_seats ?number_of_seats_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Boeing" || STR(?name_w2) = "Airbus")) && (STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "180" || STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "180.0")))
}

queries.question: List Boeing models and Airbus models with 180 seats.
queries.sql:
SELECT planes.model
FROM manufacturers JOIN plane_details ON manufacturers.id = plane_details.manufacturer_id JOIN planes ON plane_details.plane_id = planes.id
WHERE manufacturers.name = "Boeing" OR manufacturers.name = "Airbus" AND planes.number_of_seats = 180

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model WHERE {
  ?manufacturers a :manufacturers .
  ?plane_details a :plane_details .
  ?plane_details p:hasmanufacturers ?manufacturers .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?plane_details p:hasplanes ?planes .
  ?planes p:model ?model .
  ?manufacturers p:name ?name_w .
  ?manufacturers p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?planes p:number_of_seats ?number_of_seats_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Boeing" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Airbus" && (STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "180" || STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "180.0"))))
}

  ?plane_details a :plane_details .

  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?plane_details p:hasplanes ?planes .

} }
  low: { SELECT ?model WHERE {
  ?manufacturers a :manufacturers .
  ?plane_details a :plane_details .
  ?plane_details p:hasmanufacturers ?manufacturers .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?plane_details p:hasplanes ?planes .
  ?planes p:model ?model .
  ?manufacturers p:name ?name_w .
  ?manufacturers p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?planes p:number_of_seats ?number_of_seats_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Boeing" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Airbus" && (STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "180" || STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "180.0"))))
} }
}
